positive: A highly stylized, whimsical composition featuring a cluster of luminous, glowing mushrooms and ferns emerging from moss-covered roots. The mushrooms should display various pastel and jewel tones (lavender, mint green, deep sapphire) and have delicate, crystalline caps. Integrate subtle celestial elements like tiny, glowing orbs and crescent moon silhouettes scattered among the foliage. The composition must be symmetrically balanced and suitable for a central chest print. Style should be a blend of intricate bioluminescence and detailed, engraved vintage botanical illustrations. Use a deep, midnight blue and forest green color palette accented by glowing gold and pastel pops. High contrast, clean lines, intricate details, forest floor perspective, vector art quality, sticker design aesthetic.
negative: blur, ugly, artifacts, noise, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, messy, rough, bad anatomy, extra limbs, amateur, poorly rendered, jpeg artifacts
